overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a fantasy castle setting (Hogwarts Legacy), showing the player character walking through grand halls, ascending a sweeping wooden staircase, and entering a candlelit classroom with students. The environment features Gothic architecture with stone and dark wood, stained glass windows, and magical ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance hall and connecting corridor

events.description: moves from grand entrance hall into narrow corridor with statues and paintings
exits corridor into large grand hall with high ceilings and staircase

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the castle entrance and along the portrait-lined corridor toward the grand staircase

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes standing near the staircase in the grand hall

entered.detail: tall Gothic window with multiple panes showing blue exterior light
massive stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
ornate stone archway leading to the corridor
cast iron lantern suspended from the corridor ceiling
sweeping wooden staircase with carved railings ascending to upper floors

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a grand castle entrance hall with marble floors and towering windows, then transitions through a narrow corridor lined with statues and oil paintings. Warm candlelight from wall sconces illuminates the stone walls as the camera approaches a large hall with a sweeping wooden staircase.

events.description: begins ascending the grand wooden staircase
reaches wooden door and opens it to enter the classroom

agents.ego_description: climbing the sweeping staircase, passing a large tapestry, and approaching a wooden door at the top

entered.detail: large woven tapestry depicting a unicorn in a forest scene
tall thin Gothic window with diamond-patterned glass
heavy dark wood door with iron studs and handle

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the grand wooden staircase, passing a landing with a large unicorn tapestry. The walls are lined with dark wood paneling and narrow windows. At the top of the stairs, the camera approaches and opens a heavy wooden door.

events.description: enters the classroom through the wooden door
turns right to explore the side of the classroom with stacked books

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom, observing the tiered seating and students working at their desks

notable_agents.action: student in robes sitting at a desk reading a book
student sitting at a desk near the large arched window

entered.detail: large room with tiered wooden seating and multiple chandeliers
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling
rows of wooden desks and benches arranged in tiers
piles of books and scrolls stacked on the floor and tables

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a large classroom with high vaulted ceilings and tiered wooden seating. Several students in robes sit at their desks studying. The room is lit by chandeliers and blue light from tall arched windows. The camera explores the space, passing stacks of books and wooden benches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the grand, open halls of a castle into the intimate, scholarly atmosphere of a candlelit classroom. It begins in a marble entrance hall with towering windows, gliding through a narrow corridor of statues and oil paintings illuminated by warm wall sconces. As the camera reaches a large hall, it ascends a sweeping wooden staircase past a unicorn tapestry and dark wood paneling before approaching a heavy wooden door. The scene then opens into a vaulted classroom where the warm candlelight shifts to a cool blue light streaming from tall arched windows. Finally, the camera explores the tiered seating and stacks of books, passing students in robes studying at their desks.
